blocks.name: Send WhatsApp Text
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const number = (typeof b.getValue('number') === 'string' ? b.getValue('number') : String(b.getValue('number') || '')); const text = (typeof b.getValue('text') === 'string' ? b.getValue('text') : String(b.getValue('text') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/text', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', text: ${JSON.stringify(text)} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Send WhatsApp Image
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const number = (typeof b.getValue('number') === 'string' ? b.getValue('number') : String(b.getValue('number') || '')); const imageUrl = (typeof b.getValue('imageUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('imageUrl') : String(b.getValue('imageUrl') || '')); const caption = (typeof b.getValue('caption') === 'string' ? b.getValue('caption') : String(b.getValue('caption') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/image', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', url: ${JSON.stringify(imageUrl)}, caption: ${JSON.stringify(caption)} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA image sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Send WhatsApp Document
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const number = (typeof b.getValue('number') === 'string' ? b.getValue('number') : String(b.getValue('number') || '')); const documentUrl = (typeof b.getValue('documentUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('documentUrl') : String(b.getValue('documentUrl') || '')); const filename = (typeof b.getValue('filename') === 'string' ? b.getValue('filename') : String(b.getValue('filename') || '')); const caption = (typeof b.getValue('caption') === 'string' ? b.getValue('caption') : String(b.getValue('caption') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/document', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', url: ${JSON.stringify(documentUrl)}, filename: ${JSON.stringify(filename)}, caption: ${JSON.stringify(caption)} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA document sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const number = (typeof b.getValue('number') === 'string' ? b.getValue('number') : String(b.getValue('number') || '')); const text = (typeof b.getValue('text') === 'string' ? b.getValue('text') : String(b.getValue('text') || '')); const buttons = b.getValue('buttons'); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/button', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', text: ${JSON.stringify(text)}, buttons: ${buttons} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA button sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Send WhatsApp List
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const number = (typeof b.getValue('number') === 'string' ? b.getValue('number') : String(b.getValue('number') || '')); const title = (typeof b.getValue('title') === 'string' ? b.getValue('title') : String(b.getValue('title') || '')); const description = (typeof b.getValue('description') === 'string' ? b.getValue('description') : String(b.getValue('description') || '')); const sections = b.getValue('sections'); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/list', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', title: ${JSON.stringify(title)}, description: ${JSON.stringify(description)}, sections: ${sections} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA list sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Get WhatsApp Status
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waStatus')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/status', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA status: ' + JSON.stringify(d), 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Get WhatsApp QR Code
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waQr')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/qr', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('QR retrieved', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Logout WhatsApp
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = (typeof b.getValue('serverUrl') === 'string' ? b.getValue('serverUrl') : String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || '')); const token = (typeof b.getValue('token') === 'string' ? b.getValue('token') : String(b.getValue('token') || '')); const target = (typeof b.getValue('target') === 'string' ? b.getValue('target') : String(b.getValue('target') || 'waLogout')); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/logout', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA logged out', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }
